chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1980 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7391/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 01.09.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. This matter was lastly fixed in Court on 03.12.2024, thereafter no such efforts were taken by the Petitioner to proceed with the matter. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, learned Additional PG submits that the case has been challaned and accused are not appearing before the trial Court. Since the case has been challaned, therefore, the Petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach before the trial Court by moving proper application. This Petition being not maintainable is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
